items.title: Meanwhile, the LeBron-76ers thing feels like a Klutch op to gas up Tyrese Maxey. You're telling me LeBron is going to play his final season in Philly hitched to Joel Embiid when he could play on a similar contender with the Cavs (yes, I know, James Harden)?
items.author: Jason Patt
items.body_excerpt: Meanwhile, the LeBron-76ers thing feels like a Klutch op to gas up Tyrese Maxey. You're telling me LeBron is going to play his final season in Philly hitched to Joel Embiid when he could play on a similar contender with the Cavs (yes, I know, James Harden)?

items.title: Dean Wade said Tyrese Maxey and Jaylen Brown are two of the hardest people he's ever had to guard. Said Maxey is the fastest player he's defended while Brown's strength and ability to get to his spots make him special.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Dean Wade said Tyrese Maxey and Jaylen Brown are two of the hardest people he's ever had to guard. Said Maxey is the fastest player he's defended while Brown's strength and ability to get to his spots make him special.

items.title: Dean Wade says he’s excited to play with “maybe the fastest person I’ve ever tried to guard,” Tyrese Maxey.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Dean Wade says he’s excited to play with “maybe the fastest person I’ve ever tried to guard,” Tyrese Maxey. 

“I think his biggest growth was getting off the ball and making people better… He’s always going to be able to go out and get his points.”

items.title: Anfernee Simons is eager to play on and off the ball with the Sixers. He said he knows Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe have handled major workloads and he is here to relieve them of some pressure.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons is eager to play on and off the ball with the Sixers. He said he knows Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe have handled major workloads and he is here to relieve them of some pressure.

media.title: Paul George was a flashy free-agent signing two years ago. His choppy Sixers stint led to another blockbuster trade
media.description: George, a former perennial All-Star and the Sixers' big free-agent signing in 2024, played in 78 total games across two seasons — and only 36 with both Joel Embiid and Tyrese Maxey.

items.title: Having a definitively playable guard on a two-way behind Maxey/Edgecombe/Simons/Philon Jr. is very helpful for the Sixers, even if Caleb Love adds to their group of smaller guards. Frees up the Sixers to target best player available with whichever standard roster spots are open.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Having a definitively playable guard on a two-way behind Maxey/Edgecombe/Simons/Philon Jr. is very helpful for the Sixers, even if Caleb Love adds to their group of smaller guards. Frees up the Sixers to target best player available with whichever standard roster spots are open.

items.title: Jaylen Brown just did a Twitch stream. Said he was still processing the trade, called VJ Edgecombe and Tyrese Maxey (both picked up), said he was looking forward to meeting AI (and professed his love for the black jerseys) and said…
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Jaylen Brown just did a Twitch stream. Said he was still processing the trade, called VJ Edgecombe and Tyrese Maxey (both picked up), said he was looking forward to meeting AI (and professed his love for the black jerseys) and said… 

“The Process is back, motherfuckers.”

items.title: Mike Gansey is the second straight lead executive to compel Sixers ownership to sign off on a style of roster construction which almost always necessitates being a luxury-tax team. If the Embiid/Maxey/Brown trio thrives, it’s imperative that the Sixers are willing to pay the tax.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey is the second straight lead executive to compel Sixers ownership to sign off on a style of roster construction which almost always necessitates being a luxury-tax team. If the Embiid/Maxey/Brown trio thrives, it’s imperative that the Sixers are willing to pay the tax.

items.title: So the Sixers shifted to more drive and kick with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe and added Jaylen Brown who averaged the 2nd most drives per game in the league.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt:
So the Sixers shifted to more drive and kick with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe and added Jaylen Brown who averaged the 2nd most drives per game in the league. 

And that's with Joel Embiid getting healthier. 

Interesting.

items.title: Joel Embiid, Tyrese Maxey & Paul George played a total of 36 regular season games together over 2 seasons.
items.author: Keerthika Uthayakumar
items.body_excerpt:
Joel Embiid, Tyrese Maxey & Paul George played a total of 36 regular season games together over 2 seasons.

Sixers were 18-18 with all 3 available.

items.title: The Philadelphia 76ers now have $500 million committed to Joel Embiid, Tyrese Maxey, and Jaylen Brown over the next three seasons.
items.author: YujiDomainExpansion
items.body_excerpt: Source: https://www.espn.com/contributor/shams-charania The Philadelphia 76ers now have $500 million committed to Joel Embiid, Tyrese Maxey, and Jaylen Brown over the next three seasons. Absolutely insane. They still have a good amount of draft picks left too including a 2029…

items.title: So much for avoiding the three-star model of roster-building... the Sixers are now committed to paying $501,666,252 to the trio Joel Embiid, Jaylen Brown and Tyrese Maxey over the next three seasons. A seismic move for the organization.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: So much for avoiding the three-star model of roster-building... the Sixers are now committed to paying $501,666,252 to the trio Joel Embiid, Jaylen Brown and Tyrese Maxey over the next three seasons. A seismic move for the organization.

items.title: Labaron Philon has mentioned adaptability as a trait he takes pride in multiple times since being drafted by the Sixers. Feels useful while joining the Maxey/Edgecombe backcourt.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon has mentioned adaptability as a trait he takes pride in multiple times since being drafted by the Sixers. Feels useful while joining the Maxey/Edgecombe backcourt. 

"Being able to keeping playing that way and not changing now, I feel like is really important."

items.title: As of right now, Austin Reaves will check in as the 16th highest-paid guard in the NBA next season. He's just behind Darius Garland & Ja Morant and just ahead of LaMelo Ball & Tyrese Maxey.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
As of right now, Austin Reaves will check in as the 16th highest-paid guard in the NBA next season. He's just behind Darius Garland & Ja Morant and just ahead of LaMelo Ball & Tyrese Maxey.

SGA is also just behind Reaves. This is the final season of his deal before his super max extension kicks in.

items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: 76ers rookie Labaron Philon Jr. reveals Tyrese Maxey admiration before becoming teammates Yahoo Sports

items.title: Nick Nurse is not sure about three-guard lineups with Labaron Philon Jr., Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, but thinks Philon can play right away and can play both guard positions.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse is not sure about three-guard lineups with Labaron Philon Jr., Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, but thinks Philon can play right away and can play both guard positions.

items.title: Nick Nurse calls Labaron Philon Jr. an "exciting" player who can play like Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Mentioned Philon's deep range and pick-and-roll chops.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse calls Labaron Philon Jr. an "exciting" player who can play like Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Mentioned Philon's deep range and pick-and-roll chops.

items.title: Mike Gansey mentioned wanting to get Tyrese Maxey off the ball more often and believes the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will help in that effort.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey mentioned wanting to get Tyrese Maxey off the ball more often and believes the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will help in that effort.

items.title: Gansey, on the Philon/Maxey backcourt: "I think he can play with Tyrese a little bit. He's on the slighter side, but if you look back at his freshman season, he can guard."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Gansey, on the Philon/Maxey backcourt: "I think he can play with Tyrese a little bit. He's on the slighter side, but if you look back at his freshman season, he can guard."

items.title: Mike Gansey says Nick Nurse thinks "at times" Labaron Philon Jr. could play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Nick Nurse thinks "at times" Labaron Philon Jr. could play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.

"I don't see a lot of minutes, but maybe in certain situations I can."

items.title: Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick "helps" Nick Nurse, citing the massive workloads shouldered by Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last year. Says Philon needs to put on weight but "really guarded."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick "helps" Nick Nurse, citing the massive workloads shouldered by Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last year. Says Philon needs to put on weight but "really guarded."

"I know it's in him... he's competitive."

"We can't have enough guards."

items.title: Mike Gansey said the Sixers need help at every position, so he believes Labaron Philon is a fit at guard. References the workload of Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last season.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey said the Sixers need help at every position, so he believes Labaron Philon is a fit at guard. References the workload of Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last season.

items.title: Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. will learn from Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. will learn from Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.

"He's a hooper. He just finds a way."

Talked about a game against Tennessee in which Philon took over down the stretch. Mentioned he played through injuries this season.

items.title: Labaron Philon with a lot of praise for Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said he studied Maxey's game and played against Edgecombe in high school. Believes the three of them can form a great gift.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon with a lot of praise for Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said he studied Maxey's game and played against Edgecombe in high school. Believes the three of them can form a great gift.

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. says he studied Tyrese Maxey because of Maxey's ability to create his own shot, selflessness and fearlessness taking tough shots. "At the guard spot, that's really what you need: someone that's going to be a great leader." Mentioned Maxey welcoming VJ Edgecombe
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon Jr. says he studied Tyrese Maxey because of Maxey's ability to create his own shot, selflessness and fearlessness taking tough shots. "At the guard spot, that's really what you need: someone that's going to be a great leader." Mentioned Maxey welcoming VJ Edgecombe.

items.title: Labaron Philon said he's learned how to play on and off ball during his two seasons at Alabama. Said his job will be to take pressure off Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said it's "special" to play with a talented roster.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon said he's learned how to play on and off ball during his two seasons at Alabama. Said his job will be to take pressure off Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said it's "special" to play with a talented roster.

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. on his fit with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe: "Just making the game easier on them, being able to take the pressure off [them]... I would just say with Joel and all the other guys... it's special."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon Jr. on his fit with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe: "Just making the game easier on them, being able to take the pressure off [them]... I would just say with Joel and all the other guys... it's special."

Philon says he doesn't prefer playing on or off the ball.

items.title: Labaron Philon says that he connected with Jameer Nelson at the combine, and knew the Sixers were itnerested. Calls it destiny to play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, saying that he can fit in well with the pace that they play, and that he can play both on, and off, ball.
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon says that he connected with Jameer Nelson at the combine, and knew the Sixers were itnerested. Calls it destiny to play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, saying that he can fit in well with the pace that they play, and that he can play both on, and off, ball.

items.title: Asked Labaron Philon Jr. if he had pre-draft contact with the Sixers + what stands out to him about his fit. Said he talked to Jameer Nelson + others at the combine this year & talked to them last year. Said he wants to play fast-paced basketball with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Asked Labaron Philon Jr. if he had pre-draft contact with the Sixers + what stands out to him about his fit. Said he talked to Jameer Nelson + others at the combine this year & talked to them last year. Said he wants to play fast-paced basketball with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe.

items.title: Labaron Philon says he talked to Jameer Nelson and connected with the Sixers at the draft combine. Seems excited about playing with Maxey and Edgecombe.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon says he talked to Jameer Nelson and connected with the Sixers at the draft combine. Seems excited about playing with Maxey and Edgecombe.

items.title: He looks like he's going to play Tyrese Maxey in a movie.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: He looks like he's going to play Tyrese Maxey in a movie.

items.title: Labaron Philon just represented way too good a value to pass up. He should be able to step in as the Sixers' first guard off the bench right away -- much needed to give NBA minutes leader Tyrese Maxey some relief.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon just represented way too good a value to pass up. He should be able to step in as the Sixers' first guard off the bench right away -- much needed to give NBA minutes leader Tyrese Maxey some relief.

items.title: Tyrese Maxey is the gold standard of the caliber of player a team COULD draft in the early 20s. He’s also the exception, not the rule.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Tyrese Maxey is the gold standard of the caliber of player a team COULD draft in the early 20s. He’s also the exception, not the rule. 

“We got lucky,” Jameer Nelson acknowledged last week. 

Here’s a look back the past five drafts, illustrating that crapshoot. 

www.inquirer.com/sixers/nba-d...

media.title: What can the Sixers expect with the No. 22 draft pick? Past drafts illustrate the unpredictability.
media.description: There are success stories in this first-round range in the past five drafts, and players who have already fallen out of the NBA.
